scope.summary: Capture the expected failing kill -0 probe so stale service-instance-lock recovery does not leak its shell diagnostic to stderr.
out_of_scope: Changing the stale-lock reclaim decision, holder metadata, or lock-file lifecycle.

entry_points.name: service-instance stale-lock reclaim
entry_points.trace: service_instance_guard_clears_stale_lock_when_recorded_pid_is_dead writes a stale dead-pid lock and acquires its replacement. It ran with --nocapture and passed without emitting the previous kill diagnostic.

limitations: Scoped test only: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp service_instance_guard_clears_stale_lock_when_recorded_pid_is_dead -- --nocapture (1 passed). The full workspace gate was not run for this close.
